name: play-ts-cucumber
description: Playwright Cucumber TS framework - The easiest way to learn

scripts.test:all: cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/init.ts && cross-env ENV=STG cucumber-js --config=config/cucumber.js && cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/report.ts
scripts.test:smoke: cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/init.ts && cross-env ENV=STG cucumber-js --config=config/cucumber.js --tags @smoke && cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/report.ts
scripts.test:regression: cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/init.ts && cross-env ENV=STG cucumber-js --config=config/cucumber.js --tags @regression && cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/report.ts
scripts.test:staging: cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/init.ts && cross-env ENV=STG cucumber-js --config=config/cucumber.js && cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/report.ts
scripts.test:sanity: cross-env ENV=PRD npx ts-node src/helper/report/init.ts && cross-env ENV=PRD cucumber-js --config=config/cucumber.js --tags @sanity && cross-env ENV=PRD npx ts-node src/helper/report/report.ts
scripts.test:smoke1: cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/init.ts && cross-env ENV=STG cucumber-js --config=config/cucumber.js --tags @smoke1 && cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/report.ts
scripts.test:problem: cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/init.ts && cross-env ENV=STG cucumber-js --config=config/cucumber.js --tags @problem && cross-env ENV=STG npx ts-node src/helper/report/report.ts

author: Continental QA
